metadata.title: Stock And Crypto Tracker - AI-Powered Market Clarity
metadata.description: AI-powered market analysis for stocks and crypto. Get clear signals without the noise, delivered directly to Telegram.

hero.headline: Clarity for Stock and Crypto Markets.
hero.subheadlinePart1: Stock And Crypto Tracker scans global markets
hero.subheadlinePart2: and explains technical conditions in plain language. No hype. No noise. Just clear market context delivered on Telegram.

problem.heading: The market moves fast. Most signals don't.
problem.paragraph1: Retail investors are flooded with charts, indicators, and "buy" calls.
problem.paragraph2: By the time most signals reach you, the opportunity is often gone.

solution.headingSuffix: . One clear view of the market.

bullets.explain: Explains what's happening and what to watch
bullets.deliver: Sends alerts directly to your Telegram account

solution.tagline: No dashboards. No downloads. No complexity.

step1.title: We monitor the market
step1.description: Our AI analyzes price action, volume, and technical patterns across stocks and crypto.

step2.title: We detect meaningful setups
step2.description: Only when conditions matter. No constant spam.

step3.title: You get clear context
step3.description: Signal type, time horizon, confidence level, and risk to watch.

step4.title: Delivered on Telegram
step4.description: Access everything via your own Telegram account.

features.tagline: Built for investors who value discipline over hype.

trust.paragraph1: Stock And Crypto Tracker provides technical market analysis for educational purposes only.
trust.paragraph2: We do not provide financial advice, portfolio recommendations, or guarantees.
trust.paragraph3: Always apply your own risk management.

finalCta.heading: Get clarity without the noise.
finalCta.subtext: No credit card. No app download.

footer.tagline: AI-powered market analysis for stocks and crypto. Get clear signals without the noise.

definitions.title: 1. Definitions
definitions.intro: In these Terms of Service, unless the context otherwise requires, the following terms shall have the meanings ascribed to them below:
definitions.service: means the Stock And Crypto Tracker platform, including all websites, applications, APIs, and services provided by Stock And Crypto Tracker.
definitions.user: means any individual who accesses or uses the Service, whether registered or unregistered.
definitions.content: means all information, data, text, analysis, signals, and other materials made available through the Service.
definitions.subscription: means a paid arrangement granting the User access to premium features of the Service for a specified period.
definitions.thirdPartyData: means market data, financial information, and other data obtained from third-party sources and providers.

acceptance.title: 2. Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using the Service, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these Terms, you must not access or use the Service. You represent and warrant that you are at least twenty-one (21) years of age and have the legal capacity to enter into this agreement. If you are accepting these Terms on behalf of an entity, you represent that you have the authority to bind such entity to these Terms.

serviceDescription.title: 3. Description of Service
serviceDescription.content: Stock And Crypto Tracker provides AI-powered technical market analysis delivered via Telegram. The Service includes market monitoring, pattern detection, and educational insights about market conditions. The Service is provided on a subscription basis with both free and paid tiers offering varying levels of access and functionality. We reserve the right to modify, suspend, or discontinue any aspect of the Service at any time without prior notice.

notFinancialAdvice.title: 4. Not Financial Advice
notFinancialAdvice.warning: THIS SECTION CONTAINS IMPORTANT DISCLAIMERS. PLEASE READ CAREFULLY.
notFinancialAdvice.content1: Stock And Crypto Tracker is not a licensed financial advisor, broker-dealer, investment advisor, or any other regulated financial services provider. We do not hold any financial services license or registration in any jurisdiction. All Content provided through the Service is for educational and informational purposes only and does not constitute financial, investment, tax, or legal advice.
notFinancialAdvice.content2: We do not recommend, endorse, or advise the purchase, sale, or holding of any securities, cryptocurrencies, or other financial instruments. Any reference to specific assets, securities, or market conditions is purely for educational illustration and shall not be construed as a recommendation or solicitation.
notFinancialAdvice.content3: You must consult with a qualified, licensed financial professional before making any investment decisions. You acknowledge that you bear sole responsibility for your investment and trading decisions. Past performance of any analysis or signal does not guarantee future results. Markets involve substantial risk of loss, and you may lose some or all of your invested capital.

aiDisclaimer.title: 5. AI-Generated Content Disclaimer
aiDisclaimer.intro: The Service utilizes artificial intelligence and machine learning technologies to generate market analysis and signals. You acknowledge and agree that:
aiDisclaimer.content1: AI systems are inherently imperfect and may produce inaccurate, incomplete, outdated, or misleading information. We make no representations or warranties regarding the accuracy, completeness, timeliness, or reliability of any AI-generated Content.
aiDisclaimer.content2: You must independently verify all information before making any decisions. Reliance on AI-generated Content is entirely at your own risk. AI analysis is based on historical data and patterns, which may not accurately predict or reflect future market conditions or movements.

thirdPartyData.title: 6. Third-Party Data Sources
thirdPartyData.content: The Service incorporates data from third-party providers and sources. We do not control, verify, or guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of Third-Party Data. Third-Party Data is provided on an "as is" basis without any warranties. Your use of Third-Party Data may be subject to additional terms and conditions imposed by the respective data providers. We shall not be liable for any errors, omissions, or inaccuracies in Third-Party Data.

account.title: 7. User Account
account.content: Access to the Service requires a valid Telegram account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality and security of your account credentials. You agree to provide accurate, current, and complete information during registration and to update such information as necessary. You are solely responsible for all activities conducted through your account. You must notify us immediately of any unauthorized use of your account or any other security breach.

subscription.title: 8. Subscription and Payment
subscription.content1: The Service offers a free tier with limited functionality and a paid Pro tier at USD $20.00 per month. Pro subscriptions are billed monthly in advance through our third-party payment processor, Stripe. Your subscription will automatically renew at the end of each billing period unless cancelled prior to the renewal date.
subscription.content2: All fees are non-refundable except as expressly provided herein or as required by applicable law. You may cancel your subscription at any time, and your access to paid features will continue until the end of the current billing period. No refunds or credits will be issued for partial subscription periods.
subscription.content3: You are responsible for all applicable taxes associated with your subscription. We reserve the right to modify subscription fees upon thirty (30) days prior notice. Continued use of the Service after fee changes constitutes acceptance of the new fees.

conduct.title: 9. User Conduct
conduct.intro: You agree to use the Service in compliance with all applicable laws and regulations. You shall not:
conduct.content: Redistribute, resell, sublicense, or commercially exploit any Content from the Service without express written permission; share your account credentials or access with any third party; use the Service to engage in any unlawful, fraudulent, or harmful activity; attempt to circumvent, disable, or interfere with any security features of the Service; use automated systems or software to extract data from the Service without authorization; or impersonate any person or entity or misrepresent your affiliation with any person or entity.

intellectualProperty.title: 10. Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All Content, software, technology, trademarks, and other materials provided through the Service are owned by or licensed to Stock And Crypto Tracker and are protected by intellectual property laws. We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable, revocable license to access and use the Service for your personal, non-commercial purposes only. This license does not include any right to copy, modify, distribute, sell, or lease any part of the Service or its Content. All rights not expressly granted herein are reserved.

warranties.title: 11. Disclaimer of Warranties
warranties.content: THE SERVICE AND ALL CONTENT ARE PROVIDED ON AN "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE" BASIS WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, EITHER EXPRESS OR IMPLIED. TO THE FULLEST EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, WE DISCLAIM ALL WARRANTIES, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO IMPLIED WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, TITLE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT. WE DO NOT WARRANT THAT THE SERVICE WILL BE UNINTERRUPTED, ERROR-FREE, SECURE, OR FREE OF VIRUSES OR OTHER HARMFUL COMPONENTS. WE MAKE NO REPRESENTATIONS OR WARRANTIES REGARDING THE ACCURACY, RELIABILITY, OR COMPLETENESS OF ANY CONTENT.

liability.title: 12. Limitation of Liability
liability.content: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY APPLICABLE LAW, IN NO EVENT SHALL STOCK AND CRYPTO TRACKER, ITS OFFICERS, DIRECTORS, EMPLOYEES, AGENTS, OR AFFILIATES BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, PUNITIVE, OR EXEMPLARY DAMAGES, INCLUDING BUT NOT LIMITED TO DAMAGES FOR LOSS OF PROFITS, GOODWILL, DATA, OR OTHER INTANGIBLE LOSSES, ARISING OUT OF OR IN CONNECTION WITH YOUR USE OF OR INABILITY TO USE THE SERVICE, REGARDLESS OF THE THEORY OF LIABILITY. OUR TOTAL AGGREGATE LIABILITY FOR ALL CLAIMS ARISING FROM OR RELATED TO THE SERVICE SHALL NOT EXCEED THE TOTAL AMOUNT PAID BY YOU TO US IN THE TWELVE (12) MONTHS PRECEDING THE CLAIM. SOME JURISDICTIONS DO NOT ALLOW THE EXCLUSION OR LIMITATION OF CERTAIN DAMAGES, SO SOME OF THE ABOVE LIMITATIONS MAY NOT APPLY TO YOU.

indemnification.title: 13. Indemnification
indemnification.content: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Stock And Crypto Tracker and its officers, directors, employees, agents, and affiliates from and against any and all claims, damages, losses, liabilities, costs, and expenses (including reasonable legal fees) arising out of or related to your use of the Service, your violation of these Terms, your violation of any applicable law or regulation, or your violation of any rights of any third party.

termination.title: 14. Termination
termination.content: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to the Service at any time, with or without cause, and with or without notice. Upon termination, your right to use the Service will immediately cease. You may terminate your account at any time by contacting us. Sections of these Terms that by their nature should survive termination shall survive, including but not limited to provisions regarding intellectual property, disclaimers, limitations of liability, and indemnification.

governingLaw.title: 15. Governing Law and Disputes
governingLaw.content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Malaysia, without regard to its conflict of law provisions. Any dispute arising out of or relating to these Terms or the Service shall be resolved through binding arbitration conducted in Malaysia in accordance with applicable arbitration rules. Notwithstanding the foregoing, either party may seek injunctive or other equitable relief in any court of competent jurisdiction. For users in the European Union, these Terms do not affect your statutory rights under applicable consumer protection laws.

general.title: 16. General Provisions
general.content: These Terms constitute the entire agreement between you and Stock And Crypto Tracker regarding the Service and supersede all prior agreements and understandings. If any provision of these Terms is held to be invalid or unenforceable, such provision shall be modified to the minimum extent necessary, and the remaining provisions shall continue in full force and effect. Our failure to enforce any right or provision shall not constitute a waiver of such right or provision. You may not assign or transfer these Terms without our prior written consent. We may assign these Terms without restriction. These Terms do not create any agency, partnership, joint venture, or employment relationship between you and us.

changes.title: 17. Changes to Terms
changes.content: We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time in our sole discretion. We will notify users of material changes by posting the updated Terms on the Service and updating the "Last Updated" date. Your continued use of the Service after any such changes constitutes your acceptance of the modified Terms. We encourage you to review these Terms periodically.

contact.title: 18. Contact Information
contact.content: If you have any questions regarding these Terms of Service, please contact us via our Telegram bot @StockAndCryptoAdvisorBot or by email. We will endeavor to respond to your inquiry within a reasonable timeframe.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: Stock And Crypto Tracker ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your Personal Data when you access or use our Service. By using the Service, you consent to the practices described in this Privacy Policy.

definitions.title: 2. Definitions
definitions.intro: In this Privacy Policy, unless the context otherwise requires:
definitions.personalData: means any information relating to an identified or identifiable natural person, including but not limited to name, email address, Telegram user ID, and usage data.
definitions.processing: means any operation performed on Personal Data, including collection, storage, use, disclosure, and deletion.
definitions.dataController: means the entity that determines the purposes and means of processing Personal Data. Stock And Crypto Tracker acts as the Data Controller for Personal Data collected through the Service.

dataCollected.title: 3. Information We Collect
dataCollected.intro: We collect the following categories of Personal Data:
dataCollected.content: Telegram User ID, which is required to deliver the Service through Telegram; email address, used for account verification and communication; usage data, including information about how you interact with the Service, features accessed, and timestamps; and payment information, which is processed by our third-party payment processor Stripe. We do not store complete credit card numbers or payment credentials on our systems.

dataUsage.title: 4. How We Use Your Information
dataUsage.intro: We process your Personal Data for the following purposes:
dataUsage.content: To provide, operate, and maintain the Service, including delivering alerts and analysis via Telegram; to communicate with you regarding service updates, security alerts, account notifications, and support inquiries; to analyze usage patterns and improve the Service, including developing new features and functionality; to process payments and manage subscriptions through our payment processor; and to comply with legal obligations and protect our legitimate interests.

legalBasis.title: 5. Legal Basis for Processing
legalBasis.content: We process your Personal Data on the following legal bases: performance of a contract, where processing is necessary to provide the Service you have requested; legitimate interests, where processing is necessary for our legitimate business interests, provided such interests do not override your fundamental rights; consent, where you have given explicit consent to the processing of your Personal Data for specific purposes; and legal obligation, where processing is necessary to comply with applicable laws and regulations.

thirdParty.title: 6. Third-Party Service Providers
thirdParty.intro: We engage the following categories of third-party service providers who may process your Personal Data:
thirdParty.content: Stripe, our payment processor, which processes payment information in accordance with its own privacy policy; Telegram, through which we deliver the Service, subject to Telegram's privacy policy and terms of service; and hosting and infrastructure providers, including cloud service providers that store and process data on our behalf. We require all third-party service providers to process Personal Data in accordance with applicable data protection laws and to implement appropriate security measures.

security.title: 7. Data Security
security.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures designed to protect Personal Data against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. These measures include encryption, access controls, and regular security assessments. However, no method of transmission over the Internet or electronic storage is completely secure. While we strive to protect your Personal Data, we cannot guarantee its absolute security.

retention.title: 8. Data Retention
retention.content: We retain Personal Data for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes for which it was collected, including to satisfy legal, accounting, or reporting requirements. When determining retention periods, we consider the amount, nature, and sensitivity of the data, the potential risk of harm from unauthorized use or disclosure, the purposes for which we process the data, and applicable legal requirements. Upon account deletion or request, we will delete or anonymize your Personal Data within thirty (30) days, except where retention is required by law.

rights.title: 9. Your Rights
rights.intro: Subject to applicable law, you may have the following rights regarding your Personal Data:
rights.content: Right of access: to obtain confirmation of whether we process your Personal Data and request a copy thereof; right to rectification: to request correction of inaccurate or incomplete Personal Data; right to erasure: to request deletion of your Personal Data under certain circumstances; right to data portability: to receive your Personal Data in a structured, commonly used, machine-readable format; right to object: to object to processing based on legitimate interests or for direct marketing purposes; and right to withdraw consent: where processing is based on consent, to withdraw such consent at any time. To exercise these rights, please contact us using the information provided below. We will respond to your request within thirty (30) days or as required by applicable law.

internationalTransfers.title: 10. International Data Transfers
internationalTransfers.content: Your Personal Data may be transferred to and processed in countries other than your country of residence, including Malaysia and other jurisdictions where our service providers operate. These countries may have data protection laws that differ from those in your jurisdiction. We implement appropriate safeguards for international transfers of Personal Data, including standard contractual clauses where required. By using the Service, you consent to the transfer of your Personal Data to these jurisdictions.

cookies.title: 11. Cookies and Tracking
cookies.content: Our website uses essential cookies for basic functionality, including session management and language preferences. We do not use cookies for advertising, behavioral tracking, or third-party analytics purposes. You may configure your browser to refuse cookies, but this may affect your ability to use certain features of the Service.

children.title: 12. Children's Privacy
children.content: The Service is not intended for individuals under the age of twenty-one (21). We do not knowingly collect Personal Data from children. If we become aware that we have collected Personal Data from a child without appropriate consent, we will take steps to delete such information promptly. If you believe we have collected information from a child, please contact us immediately.

changes.title: 13. Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, technologies, legal requirements, or other factors. We will notify you of material changes by posting the updated Privacy Policy on this page and updating the "Last Updated" date. We encourage you to review this Privacy Policy periodically. Your continued use of the Service after any changes indicates your acceptance of the updated Privacy Policy.

contact.title: 14. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, wish to exercise your data rights, or have concerns about our data practices, please contact us via our Telegram bot @StockAndCryptoAdvisorBot or by email. We will endeavor to respond to your inquiry within a reasonable timeframe.

meta.title: Pricing - Stock And Crypto Tracker
meta.description: Simple, transparent pricing for AI-powered stock and crypto market analysis. Start free or upgrade to Pro for full coverage.

hero.title: Simple, Transparent Pricing
hero.subtitle: Start free and upgrade when you're ready. No hidden fees, cancel anytime.

cancelAnytime.question: Can I cancel my subscription anytime?
cancelAnytime.answer: Yes, you can cancel your Pro subscription at any time. Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept all major credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express) through our secure payment processor, Stripe.

refundPolicy.question: What is your refund policy?
refundPolicy.answer: We offer a 7-day money-back guarantee for new Pro subscribers. If you're not satisfied, contact us within 7 days for a full refund.

upgradeDowngrade.question: Can I switch between plans?
upgradeDowngrade.answer: Yes, you can upgrade from Free to Pro anytime. When downgrading, your Pro features remain active until the end of your billing period.

trialPeriod.question: Is there a free trial for Pro?
trialPeriod.answer: We don't offer a free trial, but our Free plan lets you experience the core features. Plus, we have a 7-day money-back guarantee.

meta.title: About Us - Stock And Crypto Tracker
meta.description: Learn about Stock And Crypto Tracker - our mission to bring clarity to stock and crypto markets through AI-powered analysis.

hero.title: About Us
hero.subtitle: Bringing clarity to markets through AI-powered analysis

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.paragraph1: Stock And Crypto Tracker was built on a simple belief: retail investors deserve better tools. Not more tools. Better ones. Tools that cut through the noise instead of adding to it.
mission.paragraph2: Our mission is to democratize access to quality market analysis. We use AI not to predict the future, but to help you understand the present clearly—so you can make informed decisions with confidence.

story.title: Our Story
story.paragraph1: We started Stock And Crypto Tracker after experiencing firsthand the frustration of information overload. Too many signals. Too much noise. Too little clarity.
story.paragraph2: Traditional market analysis tools are either too complex for everyday investors or too simplistic to be useful. We wanted to build something different—a tool that explains what's happening in plain language.
story.paragraph3: By delivering insights through Telegram—an app people already use daily—we removed the friction of checking yet another dashboard or downloading another app. Just clear context, delivered where you are.

clarity.title: Clarity Over Complexity
clarity.description: We explain market conditions in plain language. No jargon, no overwhelming charts—just clear context.

discipline.title: Discipline Over Hype
discipline.description: We don't chase trends or promise quick riches. We provide balanced analysis for disciplined investors.

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.description: We're upfront about what we are (educational analysis) and what we're not (financial advice).

simplicity.title: Simplicity
simplicity.description: No apps to download. No dashboards to monitor. Just insights delivered to your Telegram.

whatWeAreNot.title: What We Are Not
whatWeAreNot.item1: We are not financial advisors and don't provide investment advice.
whatWeAreNot.item2: We don't guarantee returns or predict future market movements.
whatWeAreNot.item3: We don't sell your data or bombard you with spam.
whatWeAreNot.conclusion: We're here to provide educational market context—nothing more, nothing less.

cta.title: Ready to Experience Market Clarity?
cta.description: Join thousands of investors who've chosen clarity over noise.

meta.title: FAQ - Stock And Crypto Tracker
meta.description: Frequently asked questions about Stock And Crypto Tracker. Find answers about our service, pricing, features, and more.

hero.title: Frequently Asked Questions
hero.subtitle: Find answers to common questions about Stock And Crypto Tracker

q1.question: What is Stock And Crypto Tracker?
q1.answer: Stock And Crypto Tracker is an AI-powered market analysis service that monitors stocks and cryptocurrencies 24/7 and delivers clear, contextual insights directly to your Telegram account.

q2.question: How does it work?
q2.answer: Our AI continuously analyzes market data, identifies meaningful technical patterns, and sends you alerts when conditions are noteworthy. Each alert includes the signal type, time horizon, confidence level, and risks to watch.

q3.question: Is this financial advice?
q3.answer: No. Stock And Crypto Tracker provides educational market analysis only. We do not provide financial advice, portfolio recommendations, or guarantees. Always consult a licensed financial advisor before making investment decisions.

q4.question: What makes you different from other services?
q4.answer: We focus on clarity over complexity. Instead of overwhelming you with charts and indicators, we explain market conditions in plain language and deliver insights where you already are—Telegram.

q1.question: Is there a free plan?
q1.answer: Yes! Our Free plan includes limited daily analysis, delayed alerts, and educational insights. It's perfect for getting started and understanding how the service works.

q2.question: What does Pro include?
q2.answer: Pro ($20/month) includes unlimited analysis, real-time alerts, full stock and crypto coverage, signal confidence labels, and priority processing.

q3.question: Can I cancel anytime?
q3.answer: Absolutely. You can cancel your Pro subscription at any time with no penalties. Your access continues until the end of your current billing period.

q4.question: Do you offer refunds?
q4.answer: Yes, we offer a 7-day money-back guarantee for new Pro subscribers. If you're not satisfied within the first 7 days, contact us for a full refund.

q1.question: How do I get started?
q1.answer: Simply message our Telegram bot @StockAndCryptoAdvisorBot and follow the setup instructions. No app downloads or account creation required—just your Telegram account.

q2.question: What markets do you cover?
q2.answer: We cover major US stocks (NYSE, NASDAQ) and popular cryptocurrencies (BTC, ETH, and more). Pro users get expanded coverage across more assets.

q3.question: How often do I receive alerts?
q3.answer: Alert frequency depends on market conditions. We only send alerts when there's something meaningful—not constant notifications. You can also customize your alert preferences.

q1.question: How do I upgrade to Pro?
q1.answer: Message the bot with /upgrade and follow the payment link. Once payment is confirmed, your Pro features activate immediately.

q2.question: How do I change my settings?
q2.answer: Use the /settings command in the Telegram bot to customize your preferences, including alert types, asset coverage, and notification frequency.

q3.question: Can I use the service on multiple devices?
q3.answer: Yes! Since everything runs through Telegram, you can access the service on any device where you have Telegram installed—phone, tablet, or desktop.

contact.title: Still Have Questions?
contact.description: Can't find what you're looking for? Our team is here to help.
